description: S3 artifact schema — loc coordinates resolved to verbatim text by map_content().

loc.description: Line range in 01_normalized pages[].text split by \n. line_start and line_end are 1-based and inclusive. For items spanning multiple pages, set page_end; line_start is on page, line_end is on page_end.

page_end.description: End page (1-based). Omit for single-page items.

line_end.description: Last line on page_end (or page if single-page).

skip_pages.description: Page numbers (1-based) of purely navigational pages — cover, TOC, revision history, index.

sections.description: All headings in document order, each with verbatim content resolved from loc.

spec_hierarchy_number.description: Section number verbatim from the document (e.g. '3.1'). Null for unnumbered headings.

level.description: Depth in the heading hierarchy (1 = top-level).

item_id.description: Spec item ID if the heading line itself carries one. Null otherwise.

content.description: Verbatim text resolved from loc by map_content().

gen_hierarchy_number.description: Generated positional reference. 'G' prefix + spec_hierarchy_number (from doc or inferred from level/position). E.g. 'G3.2'. Always present. Changes if the section is renumbered or moved.

gen_uid.description: Content fingerprint: sha256(normalize(content))[:8 hex uppercase]. Position-independent — survives section renumbering and moves. Changes when and only when the heading text changes.

spec_items.description: One entry per item or requirement-like statement, each with verbatim content resolved from loc.

item_id.description: Requirement ID verbatim (e.g. 'SYS-FUNC-001'). Null for raw specs without formal IDs.

spec_hierarchy_number.description: Item number verbatim from the document if present. Null if absent.

source.description: Layout the item was extracted from.

content.description: Verbatim text resolved from loc by map_content().

gen_hierarchy_number.description: Generated positional reference. 'G' prefix + parent section number + 3-digit sequential counter within that section. E.g. 'G3.2-001'. Always present. Changes if the item moves sections or the section is renumbered.

gen_uid.description: Content fingerprint: sha256(normalize(content))[:8 hex uppercase]. Position-independent — survives section moves and renumbering. Changes when and only when the requirement text changes. Used as stable identity when item_id is null; used for change detection when item_id is present.

extra_attrs.description: Explicitly labeled sub-fields (e.g. 'Rationale:', 'Note:'). Keys: snake_case. Values: loc pointing to the sub-field lines within the item block.

extraction_warnings.description: Extraction uncertainty warnings. Use 'ambiguous_boundary' if unsure where the item ends; 'possible_table_noise' if extracted from a table.
